title: Controller closeout: P8 slices landed
body: Pearly Drifting Jetty controller closeout: P8 operator-value Slice A landed at 2791be3c and interaction-hardening Slice B landed at 6e804485. Active queue is empty, no staged files remain, and implementation claims are closed. P8 is not complete. Next safe route is p8-attention-state; read-only scout directives were sent to Arboreal and Nebulous but were not marked seen before closeout, so treat them as hypotheses for the next session.
